# aikido_cloud_kubernetes (Resource)

Connects a Kubernetes cluster to Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_cloud_kubernetes" "production" {
  name                  = "Production Cluster"
  environment           = "production"
  excluded_namespaces   = ["kube-system", "kube-public"]
  enable_image_scanning = true
}

output "agent_endpoint" {
  value     = aikido_cloud_kubernetes.production.endpoint
  sensitive = true
}

output "agent_token" {
  value     = aikido_cloud_kubernetes.production.agent_token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) The environment classification: `production`, `staging`, `development`, or `mixed`.
- `name` (String) A name for this Kubernetes cluster.

### Optional

- `enable_image_scanning` (Boolean) Enable container image scanning. Defaults to `false`.
- `excluded_namespaces` (List of String) Namespaces to exclude from monitoring. Mutually exclusive with `included_namespaces`.
- `included_namespaces` (List of String) Namespaces to include for monitoring. Mutually exclusive with `excluded_namespaces`.

### Read-Only

- `agent_token` (String, Sensitive) The agent installation token.
- `endpoint` (String) The agent data endpoint URL.
- `external_id` (String) The external identifier.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud environment.
